name: ICD Coding — Respiratory Abnormality + Palpitations + Hypertension
description: Level 2 — MIMIC hadm 25561728 — 3 diagnoses across different systems
prompt: Patient: Male, 67 years old. Observation admission. Chief complaints: shortness of breath and palpitations. History of hypertension. No significant lab abnormalities found. EKG: sinus tachycardia, no arrhythmia. Chest X-ray: mild cardiomegaly. Diagnoses: Other respiratory abnormalities, Palpitations, Unspecified essential hypertension. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s).

codes.description: Other specified symptoms and signs involving the circulatory and respiratory systems
